user.title: Create Input Multiselect
user.description: Define the options for your multiselect helper. Enter one option per line or separate them by commas.

error.empty_options: You must provide at least one valid option.

init.title: Configure Input Multiselect
init.description: Modify the available options. Enter one per line or separate by commas.

error.empty_options: You must provide at least one valid option.
